text: New preprint *Adversarial Prompts as Distribution Shift* on arXiv.
Presented *Latent Drift* at NeurIPS 2025 (Spotlight) in San Diego.
Two papers accepted to NeurIPS 2025 and ACL 2025.
Started research internship at `NAVER AI Lab` (Foundation Models).
Started Ph.D. at Yonsei University, Trustworthy AI Lab.
Awarded Presidential Science Scholarship by KOSAF.
